caption: A man with a dark complexion, wearing a black suit jacket over a light-colored shirt and a dark tie, is centered within a circular frame against a black background. He maintains a steady, forward-facing gaze with a neutral expression across the entire sequence. To the left and right of the circular portrait, the text "Lubega S. Collins" appears in a small, white, sans-serif font. The scene remains static throughout the video, with no movement from the man, no change in his posture, and no alterations to the background or the on-screen text. The lighting on his face is consistent, and the overall composition stays perfectly still, creating a frozen image effect.
